user.title: Entity Auto-Organizer
user.description: Automatically label your entities based on their domain and device class. You can configure the rules after setup and trigger a run with the `auto_organizer.run` service.

data.overwrite: Overwrite existing labels instead of merging
data.enabled_labels: Restrict to only these label themes (leave empty = all allowed)
data.set_entity_icons: Also set a more specific icon per entity where known (e.g. Coffee Maker, TV) — never overwrites an icon you already set
data.enable_area: Add a label for each entity's area
data.enable_floor: Add a label for each entity's floor
data.run_on_startup: Run once on Home Assistant start
data.exclude_domains: Exclude entire domains/groups (select all that apply)
data.exclude: Advanced: exclude by glob pattern (e.g. sensor.test_*)
data.custom_rules: Custom rules: keyword=label per line (label must exist, e.g. pool=water)

invalid_custom_rules.title: Unknown label in custom rules
invalid_custom_rules.description: These labels in your custom rules don't exist and are ignored: {labels}. Use a built-in label key (e.g. water, energy, media).

no_areas.title: No areas defined
no_areas.description: Area/floor labeling is enabled but Home Assistant has no areas. Create areas, or turn off the area/floor options.

run.name: Run
run.description: Scan all entities and apply matching labels.

overwrite.name: Overwrite
overwrite.description: Replace existing labels instead of merging.

entities.name: Entities
entities.description: Limit the run to these entities.

cleanup.name: Cleanup labels
cleanup.description: Remove labels that were created by Auto-Organizer.

assign_areas.name: Assign areas
assign_areas.description: Auto-assign entities without an area to a matching area by name.

remove_all.name: Remove all labels
remove_all.description: Delete every label in Home Assistant, not just managed ones.

preview.name: Preview
preview.description: Preview both labels and areas together, without writing any changes.
